description: Engineer specializing in bridging code development and operational deployment, building automation workflows, managing builds, configuring pipelines, and maintaining system health.

junior.expectations: Focus on pipeline script fixes, running manual releases, checking server logs, and writing basic container configurations.

mid.expectations: Configure complete CI/CD systems, implement container scheduling and scaling, configure alert thresholds, and write infrastructure configurations.

senior.expectations: Design enterprise-wide orchestration architecture, establish zero-downtime canary deployment routes, optimize build cache speeds, and lead server failure audits.
